response.justification: While the candidate has extensive full-stack and cross-platform experience, there is minimal evidence of hands-on C++ development in the last 15+ years, with no mention of STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial automation systems — all core requirements for this role. His recent work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with C++ only referenced in a 2007–2008 role, making him a poor technical fit.
strengths: Extensive full-stack and open-source experience across diverse domains
Strong background in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and DevOps
Proven mentorship and technical communication skills via workshops and documentation
concerns: No recent C++ or STL experience — last C++ work was in 2008
Lacks demonstrated exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
No evidence of multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems or message-broker-based industrial platforms
